name: excel_boq_three_lines
comment: Founder test matrix case 5 (design section 8): an uploaded Excel BOQ, three measured line items. Fed to a run as pre-parsed rows (source=excel). Each row becomes one signature group with its measured quantity; the multi-pass mapping then grounds each line to a real rate or an honest needs_human. The 'unit' is the catalogue measurement unit the upstream Excel parser emits per line.
